'''âsh-p-v''' ('''kashapav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanoscratch|nanoscratch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanoscratch|nanoscratch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-p-v
|-
! Lemma
| kashapav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishapav|thishapav]] || [[word:jishapav|jishapav]] || [[word:shishapav|shishapav]] || [[word:kishapav|kishapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushapav|thuthushapav]] || [[word:jujushapav|jujushapav]] || [[word:shushushapav|shushushapav]] || [[word:kukushapav|kukushapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushapav|thushapav]] || [[word:jushapav|jushapav]] || [[word:shushapav|shushapav]] || [[word:kushapav|kushapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushapav|thushapav]] || [[word:jushapav|jushapav]] || [[word:shushapav|shushapav]] || [[word:kushapav|kushapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshapav|theshapav]] || [[word:jeshapav|jeshapav]] || [[word:sheshapav|sheshapav]] || [[word:keshapav|keshapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshapav|thothoshapav]] || [[word:jojoshapav|jojoshapav]] || [[word:shoshoshapav|shoshoshapav]] || [[word:kokoshapav|kokoshapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshapav|thoshapav]] || [[word:joshapav|joshapav]] || [[word:shoshapav|shoshapav]] || [[word:koshapav|koshapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshapav|thoshapav]] || [[word:joshapav|joshapav]] || [[word:shoshapav|shoshapav]] || [[word:koshapav|koshapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshapav|thĂŠshapav]] || [[word:jĂŠshapav|jĂŠshapav]] || [[word:shĂŠshapav|shĂŠshapav]] || [[word:kĂŠshapav|kĂŠshapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashapav|thathashapav]] || [[word:jajashapav|jajashapav]] || [[word:shashashapav|shashashapav]] || [[word:kakashapav|kakashapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashapav|thashapav]] || [[word:jashapav|jashapav]] || [[word:shashapav|shashapav]] || [[word:kashapav|kashapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashapav|thashapav]] || [[word:jashapav|jashapav]] || [[word:shashapav|shashapav]] || [[word:kashapav|kashapav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashapav|shashapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashapav|goshashapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashapav|gokishashapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashapavnĂŒ|shashapavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashapavnknĂŒ|goshashapavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapavnĂŒ|gokishashapavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashapavshĂ«|shashapavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashapavnkshĂ«|goshashapavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashapavshĂ«|gokishashapavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapavro|shashapavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapavnkro|goshashapavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapavro|gokishashapavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapavmu|shashapavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapavnkmu|goshashapavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapavmu|gokishashapavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashapavsher|shashapavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashapavnksher|goshashapavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashapavsher|gokishashapavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashapavng|shashapavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashapavnkng|goshashapavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashapavng|gokishashapavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashapavya|shashapavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashapavnkya|goshashapavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashapavya|gokishashapavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashapavyam|shashapavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashapavnkyam|goshashapavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashapavyam|gokishashapavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapavnĂŒshĂ«|shashapavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashapavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashapavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapavnĂŒro|shashapavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapavnknĂŒro|goshashapavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapavnĂŒro|gokishashapavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapavnĂŒmu|shashapavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapavnknĂŒmu|goshashapavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapavnĂŒmu|gokishashapavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapavshĂ«nĂŒ|shashapavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashapavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashapavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapavshĂ«ro|shashapavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapavnkshĂ«ro|goshashapavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapavshĂ«ro|gokishashapavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapavshĂ«mu|shashapavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapavnkshĂ«mu|goshashapavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapavshĂ«mu|gokishashapavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapavronĂŒ|shashapavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapavnkronĂŒ|goshashapavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapavronĂŒ|gokishashapavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapavroshĂ«|shashapavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapavnkroshĂ«|goshashapavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapavroshĂ«|gokishashapavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapavromu|shashapavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapavnkromu|goshashapavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapavromu|gokishashapavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapavmunĂŒ|shashapavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapavnkmunĂŒ|goshashapavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapavmunĂŒ|gokishashapavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapavmushĂ«|shashapavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapavnkmushĂ«|goshashapavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapavmushĂ«|gokishashapavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapavmuro|shashapavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapavnkmuro|goshashapavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapavmuro|gokishashapavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
